name: ExtensionPackagedProductDefinition_AttachedDocument
title: R5: Additional information or supporting documentation about the packaged product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PackagedProductDefinition.attachedDocument` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PackagedProductDefinition.attachedDocument` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DocumentReference)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PackagedProductDefinition.attachedDocument` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/DocumentReference)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.attachedDocument` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `PackagedProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.attachedDocument` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
